items.quote: So I do worry about the durability

items.claim: Charles Radtke has significant knockout power.
items.quote: He can hit them with some huge shots like he did to Marco Tulio. Put the man out cold.

items.claim: Charles Radtke is faster and hits harder than Jared Cannonier.
items.quote: I think CLD is going to be a lot faster. He's going to hit a lot harder.

items.claim: Alexander Hernandez slows down significantly as the fight progresses.
items.quote: if you can extend him, he does slow down. He's going to lose that, you know, explosiveness, that raw knockout power.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has poor takedown defense.
Mitch Ramirez has solid submission defense despite poor takedown defense.
items.quote: his submission defense was actually pretty solid given how poor his takedown defense was.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has the power to knock out Chase Hooper on the feet.
items.quote: I think he could definitely touch the chin of Chase super. I think he has enough knockout power to hurt him.
she has next to zero finishing upside.

items.claim: Fatima Kline is a more well-rounded fighter than Tabitha Ricci with higher finishing upside.
items.quote: I think Fatima Mle Klein has a lot much higher finishing upside and I think she is the more you know well-rounded fighter.
